This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Scroll to 100,150
  assert_equals: anchored x expected 150 but got 100
[FAIL] Scroll to 0,0
  assert_equals: anchored x expected 150 but got 100
[FAIL] Scroll to 750,100
  assert_equals: anchored y expected 150 but got 100
[FAIL] Scroll to 750,196
  assert_equals: anchored width expected 500 but got 875
[FAIL] Scroll to 195,196
  assert_equals: anchored width expected 500 but got 875
[FAIL] Scroll to 194,195
  assert_equals: anchored x expected 194 but got 250
[FAIL] Scroll to 194,194
  assert_equals: anchored x expected 194 but got 250
[FAIL] Redisplay at 194,194
  assert_equals: anchored x expected 194 but got 250
Harness: the test ran to completion.
